title: Neurodium lanceolatum
taxonomy: Neurodium lanceolatum belongs to the family of flowering plants, specifically within the order of Asparagales. This plant is further classified as being part of the genus Neurodium, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas. Neurodium lanceolatum is a specific species within this genus, characterized by its unique lance-shaped leaves and distinctive flowering habits. As a member of the Asparagales order, Neurodium lanceolatum is closely related to other flowering plants, such as orchids and asparagus. The classification of Neurodium lanceolatum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Asparagales order.
